reviews.comment:
Destacó la atención del personal del aca xq después de hacer esos divinos 150 km de ripio, el auto tenía tierra x todos lados y gentilmente me dieron los elementos necesarios para sacar el polvo acumulado y ni siquiera quisieron aceptar propina, se la dejé arriba del surtidor y me fui.... Muchas gracias

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight the excellent service from the ACA staff because after driving those wonderful 150 km on gravel roads, my car was covered in dirt, and they kindly gave me the necessary tools to remove the accumulated dust. They didn't even want to accept a tip; I left it on top of the pump and drove off. Thank you so much!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3c3RQZ2hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lujo en Cachi! Hermoso comedor, comida gourmet, atención muy cordial y esmerada! Instalaciones super cuidadas! Un lugar espectacular. Es una joya! No hay que dejar de pasar a comer y descansar en el parque y jardín que son muy muy lindos!

(Translated by Google)
A real gem in Cachi! Beautiful dining room, gourmet food, and incredibly friendly and attentive service! Impeccably maintained facilities! A spectacular place. It's a treasure! Don't miss the chance to dine and relax in the lovely park and garden!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBa3FLd3p3RRAB
